# wood-fired-tasks

> Network-wide task tracking with REST, MCP, and CLI surfaces. Vendor-neutral
> agent context — start with AGENTS.md.

## Agent entry points

- [AGENTS.md](AGENTS.md): First-read navigation hub.
- [docs/AGENT_CONTEXT.md](docs/AGENT_CONTEXT.md): Contract — canonical files, budgets, freshness, vendor-neutrality.
- [.agent-context.json](.agent-context.json): Machine-readable manifest of canonical files and groups.
- [docs/ONBOARDING_SMOKE.md](docs/ONBOARDING_SMOKE.md): Repeatable onboarding smoke test (scripted + manual).

## Architecture and navigation

- [docs/REPO_MAP.md](docs/REPO_MAP.md): Compact tree + per-directory ownership.
- [docs/ARCHITECTURE.md](docs/ARCHITECTURE.md): Data flow, mutation flows, auth model.
- [docs/INTERFACES.md](docs/INTERFACES.md): REST routes / MCP tools / CLI commands (counts verified in CI).
- [docs/NAVIGATION.md](docs/NAVIGATION.md): 19 change-type recipes.
- [docs/WORKFLOWS.md](docs/WORKFLOWS.md): Build, test, lint, dev recipes.

## Surface reference

- [docs/API.md](docs/API.md): REST API.
- [docs/MCP.md](docs/MCP.md): MCP tools (incl. `wait_for_unblock` long-poll).
- [docs/CLI.md](docs/CLI.md): CLI.
- [docs/SLACK.md](docs/SLACK.md): Slack surface.
- [docs/SCM.md](docs/SCM.md): Pluggable source control (git/perforce/none) via `tasks scm <verb>`.

## Automation

- [docs/event-router-design.md](docs/event-router-design.md): `wft-router` event-router daemon design (SSE → predicate → handler dispatch).
- [docs/automation-recipes/](docs/automation-recipes/): Copy-paste automation recipes on the vendor-neutral handler contract.
- [packages/wft-router/README.md](packages/wft-router/README.md): `wft-router` daemon reference (ships in the `wood-fired-tasks` package; run via `wft-router`).

## Other

- [docs/SETUP.md](docs/SETUP.md): Local setup.
- [docs/RELIABILITY.md](docs/RELIABILITY.md): Loop evidence anti-fabrication guardrails (`WFT_STRICT_EVIDENCE`, client SHA hook, skill discipline) and their honest scope.
- [docs/RELEASE.md](docs/RELEASE.md): Release process.
- [CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md): Contribution rules (incl. agent context maintenance).
- [SECURITY.md](SECURITY.md): Security policy.
